turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- soft background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f8fb" />

  <!-- motion/energy zigzags near head to suggest anxious buzzing -->
  <path d="M330 70 L350 90 L330 110" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M290 60 L305 82 L290 104" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9" />
  <path d="M370 100 L390 120 L370 140" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.85" />

  <!-- nervous character body -->
  <!-- torso -->
  <path d="M180 300 C180 260 200 220 256 220 C312 220 332 260 332 300 L332 360 C332 380 312 396 256 396 C200 396 180 380 180 360 Z" fill="#9fbadf" stroke="#6e8fb0" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- head -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="150" r="60" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- eyebrows (angled) -->
  <path d="M220 125 L235 115" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M292 115 L307 125" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- eyes (white with small pupils) -->
  <circle cx="234" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="234" cy="151" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="152" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />

  <!-- small trembling mouth (wavy) -->
  <path d="M236 182 C244 188 248 176 256 182 C264 188 268 176 276 182" fill="none" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />

  <!-- sweat droplets near temple -->
  <path d="M210 120 C205 110 215 100 220 110 C225 120 215 128 210 120 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" />
  <path d="M295 95 C290 85 300 76 305 86 C310 96 300 106 295 95 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M330 130 C325 120 335 112 340 122 C345 132 335 140 330 130 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- arms and hands, drawn multiple times with slight offsets to suggest trembling -->
  <!-- base arm left -->
  <path d="M200 280 C180 260 180 240 210 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) left -->
  <path d="M202 282 C182 262 182 242 212 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M198 278 C178 258 178 238 208 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- left hand (three overlapped to show quiver) -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="214" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="206" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- right arm base -->
  <path d="M312 280 C332 260 332 240 302 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) right -->
  <path d="M314 282 C334 262 334 242 304 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M310 278 C330 258 330 238 300 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- right hand (overlapped) -->
  <circle cx="302" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="298" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="306" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- small jitter lines near hands to emphasize shaking -->
  <path d="M230 230 L252 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M220 238 L241 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />
  <path d="M292 230 L270 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M302 238 L281 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />

  <!-- subtle blush / tension on cheeks -->
  <ellipse cx="214" cy="162" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />
  <ellipse cx="298" cy="164" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />

  <!-- faint shadow under character -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="420" rx="110" ry="24" fill="#d7dbe1" opacity="0.35" />
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- soft background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f8fb" />

  <!-- motion/energy zigzags near head to suggest anxious buzzing -->
  <path d="M330 70 L350 90 L330 110" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M290 60 L305 82 L290 104" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9" />
  <path d="M370 100 L390 120 L370 140" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.85" />

  <!-- nervous character body -->
  <!-- torso -->
  <path d="M180 300 C180 260 200 220 256 220 C312 220 332 260 332 300 L332 360 C332 380 312 396 256 396 C200 396 180 380 180 360 Z" fill="#9fbadf" stroke="#6e8fb0" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- head -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="150" r="60" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- eyebrows (angled) -->
  <path d="M220 125 L235 115" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M292 115 L307 125" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- eyes (white with small pupils) -->
  <circle cx="234" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="234" cy="151" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="152" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />

  <!-- small trembling mouth (wavy) -->
  <path d="M236 182 C244 188 248 176 256 182 C264 188 268 176 276 182" fill="none" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />

  <!-- sweat droplets near temple -->
  <path d="M210 120 C205 110 215 100 220 110 C225 120 215 128 210 120 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" />
  <path d="M295 95 C290 85 300 76 305 86 C310 96 300 106 295 95 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M330 130 C325 120 335 112 340 122 C345 132 335 140 330 130 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- arms and hands, drawn multiple times with slight offsets to suggest trembling -->
  <!-- base arm left -->
  <path d="M200 280 C180 260 180 240 210 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) left -->
  <path d="M202 282 C182 262 182 242 212 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M198 278 C178 258 178 238 208 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- left hand (three overlapped to show quiver) -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="214" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="206" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- right arm base -->
  <path d="M312 280 C332 260 332 240 302 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) right -->
  <path d="M314 282 C334 262 334 242 304 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M310 278 C330 258 330 238 300 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- right hand (overlapped) -->
  <circle cx="302" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="298" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="306" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- small jitter lines near hands to emphasize shaking -->
  <path d="M230 230 L252 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M220 238 L241 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />
  <path d="M292 230 L270 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M302 238 L281 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />

  <!-- subtle blush / tension on cheeks -->
  <ellipse cx="214" cy="162" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />
  <ellipse cx="298" cy="164" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />

  <!-- faint shadow under character -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="420" rx="110" ry="24" fill="#d7dbe1" opacity="0.35" />
</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Creating SVG for nervousness**

I need to create an SVG drawing that represents "nervous" without using any text. The imagery should convey nervousness with elements like shaking hands, quivering lines, sweat drops, and maybe a fidgeting person. It should all be done with simple shapes, keeping the dimensions within 512x512. I'll detail the design to include a cartoon person with a circle head, oval eyes, and a small wavy line for the mouth to indicate worry. I'll ensure this is a valid JSON string.**Designing nervous SVG**

I’m focusing on creating a simple SVG that visually represents nervousness using basic shapes. The design will feature a circle for the head at the center top, with raised lines for the shoulders and trembling hands using semi-transparent clones for motion effect. I’ll include sweat droplets near the forehead, zigzag lines around the head to indicate nervous energy, and perhaps a light gradient background. I must ensure everything is valid, self-contained, and that the JSON string is properly formatted.**Crafting SVG nervous figure**

I'm focusing on adding details to my nervous figure in SVG form. I envision three small sweat droplets near the temple, rendered in a light blue with a darker stroke. The arms will be bent, with hands near the chest, using multiple semi-transparent outlines to convey tremors. I'll create motion lines around the hands and head with zigzag paths in orange. For the body, I'll use a rounded rectangle, and I'll work on proper coordinates for all elements, ensuring everything stays text-free while formatting the JSON string correctly.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
